_note: Hausa translation — technical vocabulary for software/tech careers is not yet standardised in Hausa. English terms are retained where no established equivalent exists.

hero.eyebrow: Daina yin hasashe game da fasaha.
hero.heading: Sami hanyar fasaha da ta dace da kai.
hero.subheading: Yi ɗan gajeren gwaji ka gano manyan zaɓuɓɓukan sana'ar fasaha da suka dace da kai, abin da za ka koya, da kuma yadda za ka fara.
hero.tagline: Babu matsin lamba. Babu taswirorin da suka rikitar. Kawai mataki na farko mafi sauƙi.

cta.tryAnonymously: Gwada ba tare da bayyana suna ba

difficulty.beginner: Yana da kyau ga masu fara

salaries.title: Albasoshi a sana'ar fasaha.
salaries.disclaimer: Bayanan albashi ba daidai ba ne gaba ɗaya kuma sun wakilci yanayin kasuwa na 2025.

footer.tagline: Nemo sana'a ta open source ga masu zaɓar ƙwarewar fasaha na gaba.
footer.copyright: © 2025 NextSkill. Open source a ƙarƙashin lasisin MIT.
footer.madeWith: An gina shi da ❤️ don kowa da ke neman hanya a cikin fasaha.
